content: {"cards": [{"name": "Steadfast Guardian", "mana_cost": "{2}{W}", "cmc": 3, "colors": ["W"], "color_identity": ["W"], "type_line": "Creature \u2014 Human Soldier", "oracle_text": "", "flavor_text": "\"My shield stands between the innocent and the darkness. It shall not waver.\"", "power": "2", "toughness": "4", "loyalty": null, "rarity": "common", "design_notes": "Vanilla creature that tests restraint. 2/4 body for 3 mana is slightly below curve but provides defensive value. No abilities keeps it simple and focuses on just being a body."}, {"name": "Dawnbreak Pegasus", "mana_cost": "{1}{W}", "cmc": 2, "colors": ["W"], "color_identity": ["W"], "type_line": "Creature \u2014 Pegasus", "oracle_text": "Flying", "flavor_text": "It carries the first light of dawn across the battlefield, inspiring hope in allied hearts.", "power": "2", "toughness": "1", "loyalty": null, "rarity": "common", "design_notes": "Simple keyword-only creature with flying. 2/1 flying for 2 mana is appropriate for common white creatures, fitting the aggressive flying archetype while being simple."}, {"name": "Divine Banishment", "mana_cost": "{1}{W}{W}", "cmc": 3, "colors": ["W"], "color_identity": ["W"], "type_line": "Instant", "oracle_text": "Exile target creature. Its controller gains life equal to its power.", "flavor_text": "\"Your corruption ends here. May you find peace in the void.\"", "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "uncommon", "design_notes": "White's primary removal at uncommon. Unconditional exile is powerful but balanced by giving the opponent life, which fits white's philosophy of mercy and redemption while providing clean removal."}, {"name": "Arcane Insight", "mana_cost": "{1}{U}", "cmc": 2, "colors": ["U"], "color_identity": ["U"], "type_line": "Instant", "oracle_text": "Draw a card, then scry 1.", "flavor_text": "Knowledge flows to those who seek it with an open mind.", "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "common", "design_notes": "Classic blue cantrip that draws a card plus provides a minor benefit. Scry 1 is a small but meaningful effect that helps smooth draws. Properly costed at 2 mana for common."}, {"name": "Mage's Rebuke", "mana_cost": "{1}{U}{U}", "cmc": 3, "colors": ["U"], "color_identity": ["U"], "type_line": "Instant", "oracle_text": "Counter target spell unless its controller pays {3}. If they don't pay, you may draw a card.", "flavor_text": "\"Your magic is clumsy and predictable. Allow me to demonstrate proper technique.\"", "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "uncommon", "design_notes": "Counterspell variant that gives opponents an out by paying mana, but provides card advantage if they can't or won't pay. Tests stack interaction and offers strategic decisions for both players."}]}
